utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five items are present. Now check if each is fully specified. The health_coverage item is fully specified with cost (€330/month) and scope (physical, mental, adventure sports). Property_coverage and travel_coverage are both present but lack full detail because they are 'combined' without itemized breakdowns—so they are not fully specified. Additional_services lists a set of services but explicitly notes that no separate costs are provided, so cost detail is missing—it is not fully specified. Total_budget is present and clearly stated (€535/month). Thus, only health_coverage and total_budget are fully specified according to the format’s requirement of including details and costs.
